text.title: Press & PR Coverage Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules every application of `Press & PR Coverage` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Outreach MUST start with Tier-3 niche publications. Tier-1 (NYT, TechCrunch, WSJ) only after demonstrated coverage history of 3+ Tier-3 pieces.

rationale.source: Andrew Wilkinson / Jason Calacanis PR playbooks

rule.rationale: Tier-1 journalists discover stories from Tier-3 coverage. Pitching Tier-1 cold = ignored; pitching with 3+ Tier-3 articles = warmed-up reciprocity. Skip-the-line is fantasy.

rule.statement: Each journalist MUST be researched (last 5 articles + beat coverage) BEFORE pitching. Pitches to wrong-beat journalists are spam and burn relationship.

rationale.source: Cision / Muck Rack outreach guides; HARO data

rule.rationale: Generic pitches sent to mismatched beats = ignored AND remembered. Researched pitches with one specific article reference = 25-40% reply rate vs 1-3%.

rule.statement: Pitch MUST lead with ONE of: first/only ('first in category'), trend ('reflects industry shift'), data ('exclusive findings'), milestone ('reached X'), contrarian ('most companies do Y, we Z'). 'We launched a product' is not newsworthy.

rationale.source: AP style guide; PR Newswire angle taxonomy

rule.rationale: Journalists are filtering hundreds of pitches per day. Newsworthy angles answer 'why now? why this? why for our readers?'. Without angle = noise.

rule.statement: Pitch body MUST be under 150 words: 1 specific article reference + 1 angle + 3 concrete assets offered (exec interview / data / demo). Long pitches read = no.
rule.rationale: Journalists scan in 10-15 seconds. > 150 words = skipped. Concise pitch with explicit assets = ready-to-write story = reply.

rule.statement: Follow up 2 times maximum: at day 4 (gentle reminder) + day 10 (final value-add). Past 10 days, stop — over-following burns the relationship.

rationale.source: Cold email research; journalist outreach corpus 2023

rule.rationale: Beyond 2 follow-ups journalists feel harassed. 2 is the discipline line — reminder + value-add are enough; more = adversarial.

rule.statement: When preconditions in Applies If fail OR any item in Skip If triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
